events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: commercial concrete finishing & curing, observed field condition is "no cure (blankets/compound absent in photo)", work is in-service. Need to diagnose fault. Likely failure: inadequate/no curing leading to surface dehydration, low surface strength, scaling/cracking, durability distress. Component condition degraded or failed. Decision fail because non-compliant with ACI 308 curing requirements. Risk high. Work_stage in-service. percent_complete maybe 100? But in-service, overall progress 100. value 0. confidence high. findings: no curing measures applied, concrete not cured per ACI 308, surface strength/durability compromised. actions: investigate in-place strength (rebound, cores), assess carbonation/surface scaling, apply remedial curing/sealer, repair/overlay if needed. references ACI 302, 308.

  "rationale": "ACI 308 requires concrete to be cured to maintain moisture and temperature for proper hydration. Absence of curing blankets or compound in the photo indicates non-compliance. In-service stage means the concrete has been operating without proper curing, likely resulting in degraded surface and potentially failed strength/durability.",
  "references": ["ACI 302", "ACI 308"]
}
